input_placeholder: Enter a task in free description
textarea_placeholder: Work logs will be output here. Editable
register_the_string_to_the_shortcut_key:
Please register the string in the shortcut key. Tags beginning with "^" will not be counted.
After ";", write the details and include them in the group of strings before ";" for aggregation.
delete_log_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the log?
delete_log_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete the log?
help_overview_content: Fast Logbook PWA is a web application that allows you to easily create and manage work records with timestamps. Implemented as a Progressive Web App (PWA), it can be installed and used offline.
help_main_screen_memo: Memo Input: Enter work content or information you want to record in the text area at the bottom of the screen.
help_main_screen_shortcut: Shortcut Function: Press buttons 1-9 displayed at the top of the screen to input frequently used phrases or content with a single touch.
help_main_screen_save_status: Save Status: Check the save status with the "●" mark displayed in the navigation bar at the top of the screen.
help_main_screen_menu_operations_content: Tap the hamburger menu (≡) in the upper left to open the side menu.
help_main_screen_show_formated_log: Display Formatted Log: Shows your recorded content in a formatted view.
help_main_screen_download_formated_log: Download Formatted Log: Download your records as a file.
help_main_screen_delete_log: Delete Log: Delete the log entries for the currently selected date (a confirmation dialog will be displayed).
help_main_screen_install_pwd: Install PWA: Install as an app from the browser (only displayed on supported devices).
help_main_screen_shortcut_settings_conte: You can set frequently used phrases for shortcut keys 1-9. These can be edited from the settings screen. Field 0 can be used for entering phrases for temporary use.
help_main_screen_example_1: Fast Logbook enables automatic summarization when records follow specific formats. The following rules apply to the summary function:
help_main_screen_example_2: Tags starting with "^": Treated as comments or metadata excluded from counting
help_main_screen_example_3: ";" separator: Text before the semicolon is grouped, and text after is treated as detailed information
help_main_screen_example_5:
2025-03-06 10:00Meeting;Project A progress check
2025-03-06 11:30Development;Login screen implementation
2025-03-06 13:00Meeting;Weekly team MTG
2025-03-06 15:30Review;Code review response
2025-03-06 16:45^Tomorrow's task memo: Continue API development
2025- 03-06 17:00Development; Bug fix #42
help_main_screen_example_6: * "Meeting", "Development", and "Review" are tallied as groups, and lines starting with "^" are not counted.
help_main_screen_example_7:
2025-03-06 09:15Project A;Specification review
2025-03-06 10:30Project A;Create feedback
2025-03-06 10:45^This project is scheduled to be completed this week
2025-03-06 11:00Project B;Team MTG
2025-03-06 13:30Project A;Modification work
help_main_screen_example_8: * "Project A" and "Project B" are tallied as groups, allowing calculation of working hours for each project.
help_main_screen_example_9:
2025-03-06 09:00Customer A;Design review MTG
2025-03-06 10:30^Next meeting scheduled for next Wednesday
2025-03-06 10:45Customer B;Create proposal materials
2025-03-06 13:00Customer A;Modification response
2025-03-06 15:00Customer C;Initial hearing
help_main_screen_example_10: * Time is tallied for each of "Customer A", "Customer B", and "Customer C".
help_main_screen_example_11:
2025-03-06 09:00Development;Database design
2025-03-06 11:30Meeting;Weekly regular
2025-03-06 12:00^Check this week's KPIs
2025- 03-06 13:00Development; API implementation
2025- 03-06 15: 45Testing;Create unit tests
2025-03-06 16:00Documentation;Create API specification
help_main_screen_example_12: * Time is tallied by work types: "Development", "Meeting", "Testing", and "Documentation".
help_main_screen_example_13:
2025-03-06 10:15PRJ-001;Customer meeting
2025-03-06 11:30PRJ-001;Requirements organization
2025-03-06 13:00^Make note of important points
2025-03-06 14:00PRJ-002;Code implementation
2025-03-06 16:30PRJ-001;Create specification document
help_main_screen_example_14: * Time is tallied for each case number such as "PRJ-001" and "PRJ-002".
help_main_screen_example_15:
2025-03-06 09:30Development PRJ-001;Dashboard implementation
2025-03-06 10:00^Mobile support to be implemented later
2025-03-06 11:00Meeting PRJ-001;Client MTG
2025-03-06 14:15Development PRJ-002;Authentication feature implementation
2025-03-06 17:00Testing PRJ-001;Create test cases
help_main_screen_example_16: * Multiple classifications can be combined by separating with spaces. In this example, you can tabulate by combining work type and project number.
help_main_screen_hint: Hint: To perform summaries smoothly, it's important to record group names consistently.Be careful, as similar meanings like "Meeting" and "Conference" will be tallied as separate groups if different notations are used. Date and time are recorded automatically, but you can also enter them explicitly as in the examples above.
help_main_screen_delete_log_content: When you press "Delete Log", a confirmation dialog appears. After confirming, only the log entries for the currently selected date are deleted — entries for other dates are preserved. The deletion cannot be undone, so please take care.
help_main_screen_offline_features_conten: When installed as a PWA, it can be used in environments without internet connection. Data is saved on the device.
help_main_screen_version_info_content: The current version is displayed next to "ver." at the bottom of the side menu.
help_config_screen_title: How to Use the Configuration Screen
help_config_screen_customizable_behavior: On the configuration screen, you can customize the application's behavior and display.
help_config_screen_choice_available_time: You can round timestamp times to a specified unit. You can choose from the following options:
help_config_screen_log_readability_balan: This setting helps balance time precision and log readability. For example, if set to 15-minute units, a 10:07 record will be rounded to either 10:00 or 10:15, whichever is closer.
help_config_screen_shortcut_key_text: You can set the text assigned to shortcut keys (1-9) used on the main screen.
help_config_screen_repeated_input_one_to: Setting these shortcuts allows you to record frequently input content with a single touch.
help_config_screen_hint: Hint: For efficient work recording, we recommend registering frequently used phrases and templates as shortcuts.
help_config_screen_auto_save: Settings are saved automatically. When you return to the main screen after making changes, the new settings are applied immediately.
help_config_screen_date_roll_over_conten: Sets the time at which a new "day" begins. For example, with a roll-over time of 05:00, entries logged between midnight and 04:59 are counted as part of the previous day. This is useful for night-shift workers or anyone who works past midnight. The default is 05:00.
help_main_screen_date_input_content: The date selector in the top-right corner controls which day's log entries are shown in the text area. Only entries within the 24-hour window starting at the configured roll-over time are displayed. The date defaults to the last day you edited, and future dates cannot be selected.
notice_date_selector_content:
This version adds a date selector in the top-right corner of the main screen.

You can now view and edit log entries for a specific day. Only entries within the 24-hour window starting at the configured roll-over time are shown.

All your existing log entries have been preserved.
help_changelog:
v26.06.20 2026-06-20

  • Unified package management on pnpm, replacing npm
  • Removed the unused @juliusbrussee/caveman-code dependency, resolving its supply-chain vulnerabilities

v26.06.06 2026-06-06

  • Migrated storage from localStorage to IndexedDB for larger capacity and more reliable data persistence
  • Added date selector to view and edit logs for a specific day
  • Added configurable Date Roll-over Time setting (the hour at which a new day begins)
  • Improved shortcut input placeholders in the config screen
  • One-time automatic migration of existing localStorage data on first launch

v26.02.19 2026-03-03

  • Added Playwright end-to-end tests
  • Switched linter to Biome v2
  • Improved CI/CD pipeline
  • Added supply chain security scanning (Takumi Guard)

v25.12 2025-12-13

  • Added help screen (this screen)
  • Added multilingual support (Japanese / English)
  • Fixed IME and Enter-key handling on Android
  • Prevented translation flicker on page load

v24.08 2024-08-11

  • Added delete-confirmation dialog (Bootstrap)
  • Added save-state indicator (dirty / saved lamp)
  • Fixed Android IME blocking Enter-key log submission

v24.07 2024-07-06

  • Initial release
  • Added dark theme support
  • Added XSS prevention with escapeHtml()
  • Added PWA install button
